prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-ATMSBWGRH-STD-BLCK-2 Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): Wartech Existing Title: ASR Tactical 440 Stainless Steel Stonewashed Hunting Knife Black G10 Ridged Description: Be prepared while hunting or camping with the ASR Tactical 10.5" Stonewashed Knife.

This blade is constructed of 440 stainless steel and comes with a sturdy nylon sheath. The knife features a black G10 ridged handle, and the blade itself is stonewashed to help hide scratches. The overall length is about 10.5", and the length of the blade is 5.5". Make sure to grab one of these to bring along on your next camping or hunting trip. Search Terms: hunting knife survival tools emergency blade camping saw Features: - ASR Tactical Stonewashed Hunting Knife - Hides Scratches - Overall Length: 10.5" | Blade Length: 5.5" - Constructed of 440 Stainless Steel - Black G10 Ridged Handle - Durable Nylon Sheath === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: Wartech 10.5 in Black Stonewashed Hunting Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, 55In Blade, G10 Ridged Handle, Includes Nylon Sheath, Hides Scratches

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, 55" Blade, Black G10 Ridged Handle, Nylon Sheath, Stonewashed Finish
